title: amaryllis × rubicunda
intro: Amaryllis × rubicunda, a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Hippeastrum species, is a type of flowering bulbous perennial commonly known as the Naked Lady or Amaryllis Belladonna. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a purgative, laxative, and emetic. The health benefits of Amaryllis × rubicunda include its potential to reduce fever, treat rheumatism, and act as an antispasmodic. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs and flowers are used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
